details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory is missing (expected at top-level per governance contract)

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists with active code files (board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). Additionally scripts/run_molt_workflow.py and scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py reference moltbot. scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py also references clawdbot/moltbot.
